model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()","new":"    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=0.1)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Add light label smoothing to improve calibration and validation loss under short-budget training without changing model or optimizer complexity.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=0.1)","new":"    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Remove the regressor that hurt validation loss and increase batch size to expose more examples within the fixed 256-step budget, aiming for better loss at similar script complexity.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Increase effective data coverage per fixed step to roughly one full epoch within 256 steps, which can further reduce validation loss in this short-horizon regime.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Switch to AdamW to decouple weight decay from adaptive moments, which often improves validation loss versus Adam under the same short fixed-step budget.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.5e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"With larger batch and AdamW, a moderately higher peak learning rate can improve optimization speed within 256 steps while cosine decay and warmup retain stability.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Slightly reducing weight decay can preserve more fit capacity for this small MLP while AdamW already regularizes effectively, which may improve validation loss in the short fixed-step regime.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 64","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase hidden width modestly to raise representation capacity while keeping depth and training dynamics unchanged, targeting lower validation loss under the same 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"    warmup_steps = max(1, min(32, total_steps // 10))","new":"    warmup_steps = max(1, min(16, total_steps // 20))","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"Shorten warmup so the run reaches higher effective learning rates earlier in the limited 256-step horizon, while keeping cosine decay for stability.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"    warmup_steps = max(1, min(16, total_steps // 20))","new":"    warmup_steps = max(1, min(32, total_steps // 10))","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"Restore the prior warmup length since the shortened warmup degraded validation loss, returning to the previously better schedule shape for this fixed-step run.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.5e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Test a higher peak learning rate to accelerate optimization further under the fixed-step budget while retaining warmup and cosine decay for stability.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.2e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Probe a small additional LR increase to test whether optimization is still underpowered at 256 steps while keeping all other stable settings unchanged.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Lower AdamW beta2 for a short training horizon to make second-moment estimates adapt faster, which can improve early optimization and validation loss.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.85, 0.98)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Reduce beta1 to increase optimizer responsiveness to recent gradients in the short-step setting, potentially improving final validation loss.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.2e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.4e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"With the improved AdamW betas, test a slight LR increase to push faster progress within the fixed 256-step budget while keeping the same stable schedule.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.85, 0.98)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.85, 0.97)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Slightly lower beta2 to make variance estimates adapt faster in the short-horizon regime, potentially improving late-step updates and validation loss.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.4e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.5e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Test a final small LR increase around the current optimum to see if convergence within 256 steps can be pushed slightly further.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.5e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.4e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Revert to the slightly better learning rate after 2.5e-3 regressed, restoring the strongest observed LR setting for the remaining budget.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"USE_BATCHNORM = True","new":"USE_BATCHNORM = False","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Test removing BatchNorm in the MLP stack; with large-batch short-horizon training, eliminating BN-induced normalization noise can sometimes reduce validation loss.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"USE_BATCHNORM = False","new":"USE_BATCHNORM = True","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Revert BatchNorm removal, which caused a large loss regression, to restore the strongest-performing architecture configuration.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}
